mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_return_order a inner join lkt_order b on a.sNo = b.sNo

trim.if: AND exists (select id from lkt_order x where x.sno = a.sno and x.otype=#{orderType})

mapper.select: SELECT count(distinct b.sno) FROM lkt_return_order a LEFT JOIN lkt_order b ON a.sNo = b.sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list p ON p.id = a.pid

SELECT o.currency_code,o.currency_symbol,o.exchange_rate, a.actual_total,d.id,d.sNo,d.pid,a.p_id,d.re_money,d.user_id,a.p_name,a.p_price,a.p_integral,d.re_apply_money,a.after_discount,a.after_write_off_num,a.unit,a.num,a.size,a.sid,a.supplier_settlement,d.real_money,d.re_photo,d.r_write_off_num, CAST(d.re_type AS char) re_type,CAST(d.r_type AS char) r_type,d.re_time,b.imgurl,b.is_distribution,b.write_off_settings,c.write_off_num,c.img,e.name mchName,c.yprice as supplierPrice,a.is_addp,o.z_price as goodsPrice,e.id as detailMchId, CASE WHEN (d.r_type = 1 || d.r_type = 3 || d.r_type=16) AND d.re_type = 1 THEN '退款中' when d.r_type = 4 || d.r_type = 9 || d.r_type = 15 then '退款成功' when (d.r_type = 2 || d.r_type = 5 || d.r_type = 8 || d.r_type=10) and d.re_type != 3 then '退款失败' when (d.r_type = 1 || d.r_type = 3 || d.r_type = 11) and d.re_type = 3 then '换货中' when d.r_type = 12 then '换货成功' when (d.r_type = 5 || d.r_type = 10) and d.re_type = 3 then '换货失败' when d.r_type = 13 then '退款成功' ELSE '待审核' END prompt, o.sheng,o.shi,o.xian,o.address,o.name,o.mobile,u.mobile as user_mobile FROM lkt_return_order AS d inner join lkt_order o on o.sno=d.sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_order_details AS a ON d.p_id = a.id AND is_addp IS NULL OR is_addp = 0 left join lkt_configure c on c.id = a.sid LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list AS b ON c.pid = b.id LEFT JOIN lkt_mch AS e ON e.id = b.mch_id LEFT JOIN lkt_user u ON d.user_id = u.user_id
field(prompt,'待审核','换货中','退款中','换货失败','退款失败','换货成功','退款成功') ${reTypeSort},
d.re_time ${reTimeSort},
LIMIT #{pageNo},#{pageSize}

select count(a.id) from (SELECT d.id FROM lkt_return_order AS d inner join lkt_order o on o.sno=d.sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_order_details AS a ON d.p_id = a.id left join lkt_configure c on c.id = a.sid LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list AS b ON c.pid = b.id LEFT JOIN lkt_mch AS e ON e.id = b.mch_id LEFT JOIN lkt_user u ON d.user_id = u.user_id
) a

select a.*,b.id detailId,b.p_name,b.p_price,b.num,b.size,attr.pid goodsId,attr.img attrImg,attr.unit from lkt_return_order as a left join lkt_order_details as b on a.p_id = b.id left join lkt_configure attr on attr.id = b.sid left join lkt_order o on a.sNo = o.sNo
order by a.re_time desc limit #{start},#{pageSize}
select count(1) from lkt_return_order as a left join lkt_order_details as b on a.p_id = b.id left join lkt_configure attr on attr.id = b.sid left join lkt_order o on a.sNo = o.sNo

sql.if: and (a.sNo like concat('%',#{ordernoLike},'%') or a.name like concat('%',#{ordernoLike},'%') or a.mobile like concat('%',#{ordernoLike},'%') or a.user_id like concat('%',#{ordernoLike},'%') or a.p_sNo like concat('%',#{ordernoLike},'%'))

mapper.select:
select count(1) from lkt_return_order as b left join lkt_order_details as c on b.p_id = c.id left join lkt_order as a on c.r_sNo = a.sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list as lpl on lpl.id = c.p_id LEFT JOIN lkt_mch as lm on lm.id = lpl.mch_id LEFT JOIN lkt_supplier as s on s.id = lpl.gongyingshang
b.re_time ${re_time_sort}, b.r_type ${r_type_sort},

SELECT count(a.id ) FROM lkt_return_order a LEFT JOIN lkt_order b ON a.sNo = b.sNo WHERE a.store_id = #{store_id} AND b.recycle = 0 AND a.user_id = #{user_id} AND b.otype IN ( 'GM','VI','PT' ) AND b.user_recycle = 1 AND a.r_type not in (2,8,4,9,10,12,13,15) and b.status != 7
select count(1) from lkt_return_order a,lkt_order_details b where a.p_id=b.id and a.store_id = #{storeId} and a.sNo = #{sNo} and a.r_type not in (2,8,4,9,10,12,13,15) and b.r_status != 7
